title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.950 - Report of work and proceedings (third and fourth class counties)
text:
205.950.  Report of work and proceedings (third and fourth class counties). — The county superintendent of public welfare shall each year prepare and keep on file, a full report of his work and proceedings during the year, and shall file a copy with the county commission and with the secretary of the department of social services.
(RSMo 1939 § 9731) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14196
